name: Rahim Khan
bio: Childhood best friend from primary school in Old Dhaka. We used to play street cricket until sunset and share one plate of fuchka.

name: Fatima Ahmed
bio: BUET roommate and study partner. We survived tough engineering semesters together and still celebrate every result with rooftop biryani.

name: Arif Hossain
bio: Ex-colleague from Robi Axiata. We bonded during crazy office deadlines and weekend tea breaks at the Gulshan cafeteria.

name: Nadia Islam
bio: Met at the Banani gym. We push each other during early morning workouts and share healthy iftar recipes during Ramadan.

name: Samiul Karim
bio: Long-time Valorant and BGMI squad mate. Even after he moved to Sylhet, we still play ranked matches every Thursday night.

name: Priya Das
bio: Grew up in the same building in Chittagong. Our families still meet for Durga Puja and exchange homemade sweets during festivals.

name: Tareq Rahman
bio: Travel buddy from our Cox's Bazar and Sreemangal trips. Always the one planning the next hill trek or beach camping.

name: Laila Begum
bio: Fellow member of our small Dhaka book club. We discuss Humayun Ahmed novels and modern Bangla poetry over chai and shingara.

name: Shakib Al Hasan
bio: Cricket teammate from local club in Mirpur. We still argue about match strategies and watch Bangladesh matches together.

name: Sharmin Akter
bio: Art college friend from Dhaka University. We used to paint together at Charukala and visit art exhibitions on weekends.

name: Imran Hossain
bio: Tech colleague from a startup in Banani. We debug code together and grab kebabs after long coding sessions.

name: Nowshin Khan
bio: Met at a music event in Gulshan. We sing Rabindra Sangeet and modern Bengali songs during late-night adda sessions.

name: Fahim Ahmed
bio: Photography partner. We roam around Dhaka for street photography and edit photos together at cafes.

name: Ayesha Rahman
bio: Cooking enthusiast friend. We experiment with new recipes and host small iftar or dinner parties at home.

name: Niloy Das
bio: Business network friend from Bashundhara. We discuss startup ideas and market trends over tea in the city.

name: Sadia Islam
bio: Former school teacher and mentor. Still seek her advice on career and life decisions over phone calls.
